phrasal_verbs.meaning: return something to the place it came from

A.title: Topic vocabulary (gap fill)

B.title: Phrasal verbs
B.instructions: Complete each sentence with a phrasal verb from the box.

questions.sentence: Could you ...... the total cost before we pay?
I'm going to ...... these shoes because they hurt my feet.
Please ......! The sale ends in ten minutes.
I borrowed £15 from Mia and promised to ...... it ...... on Friday.
Liam is ...... for a new games console.

C.title: Prepositional phrases
C.instructions: Choose the correct phrase to complete each sentence.

questions.sentence: Do you want to pay **in cash / for rent / in debt** or by card?
Their old car is **for sale / in cash / by credit card**.
That small office is **for rent / in debt / in cash**.
She paid for the hotel **by credit card / for sale / in debt**.
He was **in debt / for rent / in good condition** after borrowing too much money.
The phone is second-hand but **in good condition / for sale / in cash**.

D.title: Word patterns
D.instructions: Complete each sentence with one suitable preposition.

questions.sentence: This jacket belongs ...... my brother.
Did you borrow that book ...... the library?
We bought our sofa ...... a furniture shop outside town.
I can't choose ...... the red bag and the blue one.
It's useful to compare prices ...... different websites.
Have you decided ...... a birthday present for Tom?
Can you lend your calculator ...... me for a minute?
She spent all her money ...... clothes.

E.title: Word formation
E.instructions: Complete the sentence with the correct form of the word in capitals.

questions.sentence: The final bill included an ...... for service. (ADD)
This online course is cheap and very ...... . (AFFORD)
There is no ...... between the two products; they are almost the same. (COMPARE)
Choosing the smaller flat was a sensible ...... . (DECIDE)
This watch looks nice, but it isn't very ...... . (EXPENSE)
That shopping app is really ...... for comparing prices. (USE)
Please tell me the ...... about how much it cost. (TRUE)
This old coin is quite ...... . (VALUE)

F.title: Word formation
F.instructions: Complete each sentence with the correct form of the word in capitals.

questions.sentence: My parents made a good ...... when they bought that property. (INVEST)
The business owner became very ...... after opening five shops. (WEALTH)
The ...... of the new supermarket is on Saturday. (OPEN)
You need financial ...... if you use a credit card. (RESPONSIBLE)
There was a 20% ...... on winter coats. (REDUCE)
The company offers ...... to many local people. (EMPLOY)

H.title: Word building
H.instructions: Complete each sentence with the correct form of the word in brackets.

questions.sentence: Her ...... helped her save enough money for the trip. (DETERMINE)
The shop window showed a lot of ...... . (CREATE)
It took real ...... to start a business at sixteen. (BRAVE)
The ...... of the charity sale was excellent. (ORGANISE)
His ...... to bargain helped him get a lower price. (ABLE)
